full_prompt:
You are generating one advertisement stimulus for a behavioural experiment.

Output format MUST be exactly four lines:
Hook: <one sentence>
Facts: <one sentence reproduced verbatim from FACTS_LINE>
Framing: <2–3 sentences; targeting happens here>
CTA: <one neutral sentence; no urgency>

Hard constraints:
- Total combined text (Hook+Facts+Framing+CTA) must be 90–110 words. Count number of words before providing the message to meet the word count requirement.
- Facts line must match FACTS_LINE exactly (verbatim).
- Do NOT add any benefits/claims beyond the facts line.
- Do NOT use social proof, scarcity/urgency, or authority cues.
- Do NOT mention personality labels or address the reader as a trait (e.g., “as an extravert…”).
- Do NOT use bullet points or lists; write natural sentences.

TARGETING (GENERIC):
Write a general, broadly appealing ad that is NOT tailored to any personality trait.
Keep the framing neutral: avoid strong social/crowd language AND avoid novelty/abstract “exploration” language.
Do not imply “quiet solo recharge” either—stay balanced and mainstream.

Now generate for:
PRODUCT_NAME = Subscription coffee
INTERNAL_VARIANT = GENERIC
FACTS_LINE = Fresh beans delivered monthly, your roast preference, flexible skip/pause, and tasting notes included with each delivery.
PARAPHRASE_ID = 1
/no_think

content.hook: Enjoy freshly roasted coffee, perfectly tailored to your taste.
content.facts: Fresh beans delivered monthly, your roast preference, flexible skip/pause, and tasting notes included with each delivery.
content.framing: Each month, you’ll receive a new selection of beans roasted to match your preferred level, ensuring consistent quality and flavor. You can easily skip or pause deliveries at any time, making it convenient for changing schedules. The included tasting notes provide insight into the origin, processing method, and flavor characteristics of each batch, helping you better understand what you’re drinking. This consistent delivery supports a steady coffee routine without extra effort.
content.cta: Visit the website to learn more about the subscription.
content.full_message: Enjoy freshly roasted coffee, perfectly tailored to your taste. Fresh beans delivered monthly, your roast preference, flexible skip/pause, and tasting notes included with each delivery. Each month, you’ll receive a new selection of beans roasted to match your preferred level, ensuring consistent quality and flavor. You can easily skip or pause deliveries at any time, making it convenient for changing schedules. The included tasting notes provide insight into the origin, processing method, and flavor characteristics of each batch, helping you better understand what you’re drinking. This consistent delivery supports a steady coffee routine without extra effort. Visit the website to learn more about the subscription.
